vars.description: The final blackboard the interpreter must return: variable name → value.

steps.description: The number of steps the flow declares (guards vector/flow drift).

slaMs.description: Total scheduled SLA/timer duration in milliseconds across the flow (timer steps + escalated human-tasks + escalated external-tasks).

events.description: Optional pinned Case/Task **event-history** type sequence (doc 04 §5.1/§5.2), e.g. `["case.created", "task.created", …]`.

correlations.description: Optional pinned **correlation ids injected** on each `external-task` submit (doc 04 §2.8, doc 05 §11.1) — proves the correlation contract binds the reply to the waiting instance.

description: The pinned expected observations of interpreting a conformance vector's Flow.
